      • findLocalReference

        private java.lang.String findLocalReference(java.lang.String identifier,
                                            java.util.Map<java.lang.String,LocalProcessNode> localReferences)
        Search for a reference, swapping any undefined variables for regexps that match anything.
        Parameters:
        identifier - The identifier to find
        localReferences - A list of all local references
        Returns:
        The local reference key, or null if no match is found.

      • replaceReferences
